host_added: ✅ Player {mention} has been promoted to Host.
host_removed: ✅ Player {mention} has been demoted from Host.
err_no_host_role: ❌ Host role is not configured in the database. Run /setup.
err_no_perms: ❌ You do not have permission to use this command.
setup_success: ✅ Old infrastructure deleted, new infrastructure successfully created and linked to the database.
clear_limit: ⚠️ Please specify an amount between 1 and 100.
clear_forbidden: ❌ The bot lacks 'Manage Messages' permission in this channel.
clear_error: ❌ An error occurred while trying to clear the chat.
reset_warning:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This command will permanently delete ALL statistics, match history, lobbies, and reset seasons.
To confirm, run the command again and enter `CONFIRM`.
reset_success: ✅ Server database fully wiped. Seasons reset, statistics deleted.
reset_error: ❌ A critical error occurred while wiping the database.
unban_success: ✅ Ban and penalty role removed from player {mention}.
unban_not_found: ⚠️ Player {mention} was not banned or not found in the database.
punish_success: ✅ Player {mention} penalized by **{penalty} PTS** and suspended from matchmaking for **{hours} h**. Reason: {reason}
banlist_empty: The ban list is empty. Everyone is a good boy!
reg_rules_desc:
Welcome to the matchmaking system!

**CRITICAL:** YOU MUST ALLOW DIRECT MESSAGES (DMs) FROM THE BOT ON THIS SERVER. Otherwise, you physically will not receive the lobby password!

**Main commands:**
`/lobby` — create or manage a lobby
`/history` — view match history
`/stats` — your statistics

Be respectful. Griefing, leaving, or toxicity will result in an immediate Tribunal ban and PTS penalty.
